analysis.reasoning: Core message: The tweet claims China applies COVID-19 measures equally to Chinese and foreigners, including diplomats—no exemptions, no discrimination or privileges. Evaluation: CH1 (West immoral/hostile) – Not present; no comparison or criticism of the West. CH2 (China is a benevolent power) – Partially aligned: it projects China as fair, rules-based, prioritizing collective health and security without discrimination, which fits a cooperative, law-abiding image. CH3 (epic history) – Not relevant. CH4 (appropriate political system and honorable values) – Applicable: it promotes the moral uprightness and fairness of China’s governance domestically (equal application of rules, no privileges), aligning with honorable values and proper management. CH5 (CCP succeeds) – Not directly; no outcomes or achievements claimed. CH6 (culture/nature) – Not relevant. Conclusion: CH2 and CH4 are promoted.
